description: Scope-guard for the v0.16.3 D-CA-001 fix. A module-mock `src/__mocks__/baz.ts` (the Jest/Vitest auto-mock convention) carries a hardcoded JWT. The canonical isTestFile() helper must still match the `__mocks__/` path segment and skip the file — auto-mocks are test-infrastructure, not production code. If this fixture flips to FAIL post-fix, the helper lost the `__mocks__/` segment-check.
